TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Aniniay_romi’ad_a_likisi, title = Aniniay_romi’ad_a_likisi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aniniay_romi’ad_a_likisi} }

S.FORM: == Aniniay romi'ad a likisi - 0509 Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal == Ika a pacipatan "Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal" a likisi. Tona mapalasawad koya "Tongyin kanloan seci linci telekan" i, o nipatatekoan mato caayho ka ta'engad ko romi'ad no Taywan, I 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, ci Liao Weicheng, Chen Zhengran, Wang Xiuhui aci Masao Nikar sasepat, pakayni pisa'osi nangra to tilid ni Shi Ming to "400 mihecaan likisi no Taywan tamdaw", mala o miliyangay to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" marepet no mihelamay, saka o nian a demak, saka tatongotongod no finawlan no Taywan miliyang to nikapolongan onto. 1991 miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad, mipalasawad to "Tongyin kanloan seci linci telekan", nika o Taywan o caciso'elinay to o nikapolongan ato mapakoniraay haw? so'elinay caayay aca. Itiya, o pipalasawad to "Tongyin kanloan seci linci telekan" a saan, ira ho ko "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek", rikec 100 liyad saka 2 tosir o mamipatala to sapirawraw raraw, mangocedisay a tawa, mipadoedo mikantok to sapakoniraaw no finalan no Taywan. Nanoya, tona Tsinghua daykako kingkiwsi ci Liao Weicheng (Liāu Uí-thîng), matayalay to ponka tamdaw ci Chen Zhengran (Tân Tsìng-jiân), syakay onto a fafahiyan ci Wang Xiuhui (Ông Siù-huī) aci Masao Nikar sasepat, o pisa'osi nangra to nitilidan ni Shi Ming to "400 mihecaan likisi no Taywan tamdaw" i, mapamotek no Fawopo mihelamay. 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, mihelamay maocor ko papinapina tamdaw misetol to pitilidan no Tsinghua daykako, mirepet cangraan a tamdaw, sacisowal sa o nano nidamaan ni Shi Ming cangra, micowat to Misatataday to Taywan yofayof i Taywan, o mamifelih to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" saan saka repeten cangra, nano nian a demak, citodongay pacipat to sapisinting a kapah no Lukai tamdaw ci Cegau Drululan, i 5 folad 11 romi'ad repatan mirofo itiya. Nanoyaan, o nano nisimedan a tilid to "400 mihecaan likisi no Taywan tamdaw", ala cecay to ko tamdaw tonini a tilid, alatek 'alomanay to ko tamdaw pakanengneng tayra i Dipong ci Shi Mingan, orasaka, ira ko saanay tamdaw, malengat ko micowat to Misatataday to Taywan yofayof i Taywan, so'elin atekak ko demak no Kuomintang, saki macowatay lowad onto no mitiliday a patalaw na saan i, o halaka to piepec to sician ko matiniay. Pakayni to nian pirepat a demak ranikay sa masasicalay ko kasadaykako, i 5 folad 12 romi'ad, tayra masafeleng ko mitiliday i "Dazhongzhizheng" potal miliyang, talacowa kasafelengan toya romi'ad, ira ko semo'otay miliyangay mitiliday malaplapay no imien ato hitay, pacofcof han padakaw to tosiya mipalaliw, nika matiniay a demak mala sapifelihaw no finawlan, saka micalap to siyataw no cilamalay i Taypi, ato pipalasawad onto to rikec 100 liyad. 1991 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, nai polong kasa niyaro' mitiliday ato syakay onto dademakay micalap to siyataw no cilamalay i Taypi, o todong pidama micoker to marepetay no Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a tamdaw, onini a picalap a demakan padoedo 6 romi'adan, itini no finawlan a sapenec, i 5 folad 17 romi'ad, Lipoyin kinatolo mihayda palasawad to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek". Itiya 5 folad 20 romi'ad, miliyangay finawlan palowad to mifelihay to sici a piepec 'ofadan tamdaw mirakat, miliyas to siyataw no cilamalay i Taypi. Tahamatini, "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" mapalasawaday to, nika o sasapinangen ho ko "rikec" 100 liyad caayho kademak, orasaka o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal o nian to "rikec" 100 liyad saka 2 todir ko sapipalowad to o mamipatala to sapirawraw ko sapararaw. Nanoya, mapalasawad ko rikec 100 liyad a demak padoedo haca macowat. Tangasa saka tosa miheca 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Lipoyin kana tolo mihayda "rikec" 100 liyad masalof, pakayni to nian a analal mapasetek to o caayay ko tateleken sato, o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a demakan katatongotongodan nanoyaan sato paherek. Manengneng to, o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal mapalowad ko sapipalasawad to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" ato "rikec" 100 liyad pisalofaw a tadamaanay demak, saki nikapolongan no Taywan ira aca ko talolongay a mafiyol, o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a miteka paherekan oya midiwadiway ci Liao Jianhua ko misyasingay likisi pala filomo "Saikoray mifelihay ciraraway a analal", o piliclican ato patodongan a salicay, malecad to toya nitilidan a cudad, o todong piharatngan minengneng toya to'ek mihecaan mahiratengay ato kimad. Oroma sato, kasapinangan a demak, o nirakatan no nikapolongan no Taywan, tangasa tonini 30 mihecaan, itiya to masapinang ko kacomahad no nikapolongan, o nian a nisidayan a tilidan, mapatapal kita, caay ko inacilaay ho a demak, nikapolongan, caay ko tangsol sanay ciheci, onini i o dadoedoen no ikoray a tamdaw, padoedo mipadama ato midoedo to nian.
S.PHON: == aniniaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ɾikisi - **** misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ == ika a paʦipatan "misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ" a ɾikisi. to~una mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~uja "to~uŋjin kanɾo~uan səʦi ɾinʦi təɾəkan" i, o~u nipatatəko~uan mato~u ʦaajħo~u ka taʡəŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u tajwan, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ, ʦħən *ħəŋran, waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui aʦi masao~u nikar sasəpat, pakajni pisaʡo~usi naŋra to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ni sħi miŋ to~u "*** miħəʦaan ɾikisi no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw", maɾa o~u miɾijaŋaj to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" marəpət no~u miħəɾamaj, saka o~u nian a ɬ~ɮəmak, saka tato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan miɾijaŋ to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "to~uŋjin kanɾo~uan səʦi ɾinʦi təɾəkan", nika o~u tajwan o~u ʦaʦiso~uʡəɾinaj to~u o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ato~u mapako~uniraaj ħaw? so~uʡəɾinaj ʦaajaj aʦa. itija, o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "to~uŋjin kanɾo~uan səʦi ɾinʦi təɾəkan" a saan, ira ħo~u ko~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək", rikəʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~usir o~u mamipataɾa to~u sapirawraw raraw, maŋo~uʦəɬ~ɮisaj a tawa, mipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mikanto~uk to~u sapako~uniraaw no~u finaɾan no~u tajwan. nano~uja, to~una tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u kiŋkiwsi ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ (ɾi*o~u~u o~u~u*-tħ*ŋ), matajaɾaj to~u po~unka tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran (t*n ts*ŋ-ji*n), sjakaj o~unto~u a fafaħijan ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui (*ŋ si*-ħo~u~u*) aʦi masao~u nikar sasəpat, o~u pisaʡo~usi naŋra to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni sħi miŋ to~u "*** miħəʦaan ɾikisi no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw" i, mapamo~utək no~u fawo~upo~u miħəɾamaj. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħəɾamaj mao~uʦo~ur ko~u papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw misəto~uɾ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u, mirəpət ʦaŋraan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa o~u nano~u niɬ~ɮamaan ni sħi miŋ ʦaŋra, miʦo~uwat to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf i tajwan, o~u mamifəɾiħ to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" saan saka rəpətən ʦaŋra, nano~u nian a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paʦipat to~u sapisintiŋ a kapaħ no~u ɾo~u~ukai tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ rəpatan miro~ufo~u itija. nano~ujaan, o~u nano~u nisiməɬ~ɮan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "*** miħəʦaan ɾikisi no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw", aɾa ʦəʦaj to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, aɾatək ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw pakanəŋnəŋ tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi sħi miŋan, o~urasaka, ira ko~u saanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾəŋat ko~u miʦo~uwat to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf i tajwan, so~uʡəɾin atəkak ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ko~u~uo~umintaŋ, saki maʦo~uwataj ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ o~unto~u no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a pataɾaw na saan i, o~u ħaɾaka to~u piəpəʦ to~u siʦian ko~u matiniaj. pakajni to~u nian pirəpat a ɬ~ɮəmak ranikaj sa masasiʦaɾaj ko~u kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajra masafəɾəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i "ɬ~ɮa*ħo~uŋ*ħi*ħəŋ" po~utaɾ miɾijaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa kasafəɾəŋan to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u səmo~uʡo~utaj miɾijaŋaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj maɾapɾapaj no~u imiən ato~u ħitaj, paʦo~ufʦo~uf ħan paɬ~ɮakaw to~u to~usija mipaɾaɾiw, nika matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak maɾa sapifəɾiħaw no~u finawɾan, saka miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi, ato~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ o~unto~u to~u rikəʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nai po~uɾo~uŋ kasa nijaro~uʡ mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u sjakaj o~unto~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piɬ~ɮama miʦo~ukər to~u marəpətaj no~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~unini a piʦaɾap a ɬ~ɮəmakan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, itini no~u finawɾan a sapənəʦ, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾipo~ujin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək". itija * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaŋaj finawɾan paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u mifəɾiħaj to~u siʦi a piəpəʦ ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw mirakat, miɾijas to~u sijataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi. taħamatini, "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u, nika o~u sasapinaŋən ħo~u ko~u "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ ʦaajħo~u kaɬ~ɮəmak, o~urasaka o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ o~u nian to~u "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~uɬ~ɮir ko~u sapipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u o~u mamipataɾa to~u sapirawraw ko~u sapararaw. nano~uja, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u rikəʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħaʦa maʦo~uwat. taŋasa saka to~usa miħəʦa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾipo~ujin kana to~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ masaɾo~uf, pakajni to~u nian a anaɾaɾ mapasətək to~u o~u ʦaajaj ko~u tatəɾəkən sato~u, o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmakan katato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮan nano~ujaan sato~u paħərək. manəŋnəŋ to~u, o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" ato~u "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ pisaɾo~ufaw a taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɬ~ɮəmak, saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan ira aʦa ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a mafijo~uɾ, o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a mitəka paħərəkan o~uja miɬ~ɮiwaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi ɾiao~u *ianħo~u~ua ko~u misjasiŋaj ɾikisi paɾa fiɾo~umo~u "saiko~uraj mifəɾiħaj ʦirarawaj a anaɾaɾ", o~u piɾiʦɾiʦan ato~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a saɾiʦaj, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u to~uja nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piħaratŋan minəŋnəŋ to~uja to~uʡək miħəʦaan maħiratəŋaj ato~u kimaɬ~ɮ. o~uro~uma sato~u, kasapinaŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u nirakatan no~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan, taŋasa to~unini ** miħəʦaan, itija to~u masapinaŋ ko~u kaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, o~u nian a nisiɬ~ɮajan a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, mapatapaɾ kita, ʦaaj ko~u inaʦiɾaaj ħo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, ʦaaj ko~u taŋso~uɾ sanaj ʦiħəʦi, o~unini i o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uən no~u iko~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mipaɬ~ɮama ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u nian.
S.FORM: == Aniniay romi'ad a likisi - 0509 Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal == Ika a pacipatan "Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal" a likisi. Tona mapalasawad koya "Tongyin kanloan seci linci telekan" i, o nipatatekoan mato caayho ka ta'engad ko romi'ad no Taywan, I 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, ci Liao Weicheng, Chen Zhengran, Wang Xiuhui aci Masao Nikar sasepat, pakayni pisa'osi nangra to tilid ni Shi Ming to "400 mihecaan likisi no Taywan tamdaw", mala o miliyangay to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" marepet no mihelamay, saka o nian a demak, saka tatongotongod no finawlan no Taywan miliyang to nikapolongan onto. 1991 miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad, mipalasawad to "Tongyin kanloan seci linci telekan", nika o Taywan o caciso'elinay to o nikapolongan ato mapakoniraay haw? so'elinay caayay aca. Itiya, o pipalasawad to "Tongyin kanloan seci linci telekan" a saan, ira ho ko "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek", rikec 100 liyad saka 2 tosir o mamipatala to sapirawraw raraw, mangocedisay a tawa, mipadoedo mikantok to sapakoniraaw no finalan no Taywan. Nanoya, tona Tsinghua daykako kingkiwsi ci Liao Weicheng (Liāu Uí-thîng), matayalay to ponka tamdaw ci Chen Zhengran (Tân Tsìng-jiân), syakay onto a fafahiyan ci Wang Xiuhui (Ông Siù-huī) aci Masao Nikar sasepat, o pisa'osi nangra to nitilidan ni Shi Ming to "400 mihecaan likisi no Taywan tamdaw" i, mapamotek no Fawopo mihelamay. 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, mihelamay maocor ko papinapina tamdaw misetol to pitilidan no Tsinghua daykako, mirepet cangraan a tamdaw, sacisowal sa o nano nidamaan ni Shi Ming cangra, micowat to Misatataday to Taywan yofayof i Taywan, o mamifelih to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" saan saka repeten cangra, nano nian a demak, citodongay pacipat to sapisinting a kapah no Lukai tamdaw ci Cegau Drululan, i 5 folad 11 romi'ad repatan mirofo itiya. Nanoyaan, o nano nisimedan a tilid to "400 mihecaan likisi no Taywan tamdaw", ala cecay to ko tamdaw tonini a tilid, alatek 'alomanay to ko tamdaw pakanengneng tayra i Dipong ci Shi Mingan, orasaka, ira ko saanay tamdaw, malengat ko micowat to Misatataday to Taywan yofayof i Taywan, so'elin atekak ko demak no Kuomintang, saki macowatay lowad onto no mitiliday a patalaw na saan i, o halaka to piepec to sician ko matiniay. Pakayni to nian pirepat a demak ranikay sa masasicalay ko kasadaykako, i 5 folad 12 romi'ad, tayra masafeleng ko mitiliday i "Dazhongzhizheng" potal miliyang, talacowa kasafelengan toya romi'ad, ira ko semo'otay miliyangay mitiliday malaplapay no imien ato hitay, pacofcof han padakaw to tosiya mipalaliw, nika matiniay a demak mala sapifelihaw no finawlan, saka micalap to siyataw no cilamalay i Taypi, ato pipalasawad onto to rikec 100 liyad. 1991 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, nai polong kasa niyaro' mitiliday ato syakay onto dademakay micalap to siyataw no cilamalay i Taypi, o todong pidama micoker to marepetay no Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a tamdaw, onini a picalap a demakan padoedo 6 romi'adan, itini no finawlan a sapenec, i 5 folad 17 romi'ad, Lipoyin kinatolo mihayda palasawad to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek". Itiya 5 folad 20 romi'ad, miliyangay finawlan palowad to mifelihay to sici a piepec 'ofadan tamdaw mirakat, miliyas to siyataw no cilamalay i Taypi. Tahamatini, "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" mapalasawaday to, nika o sasapinangen ho ko "rikec" 100 liyad caayho kademak, orasaka o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal o nian to "rikec" 100 liyad saka 2 todir ko sapipalowad to o mamipatala to sapirawraw ko sapararaw. Nanoya, mapalasawad ko rikec 100 liyad a demak padoedo haca macowat. Tangasa saka tosa miheca 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Lipoyin kana tolo mihayda "rikec" 100 liyad masalof, pakayni to nian a analal mapasetek to o caayay ko tateleken sato, o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a demakan katatongotongodan nanoyaan sato paherek. Manengneng to, o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a analal mapalowad ko sapipalasawad to "Cenci (pitefoc) to mirawraway telek" ato "rikec" 100 liyad pisalofaw a tadamaanay demak, saki nikapolongan no Taywan ira aca ko talolongay a mafiyol, o Misatataday to Taywan yofayof a miteka paherekan oya midiwadiway ci Liao Jianhua ko misyasingay likisi pala filomo "Saikoray mifelihay ciraraway a analal", o piliclican ato patodongan a salicay, malecad to toya nitilidan a cudad, o todong piharatngan minengneng toya to'ek mihecaan mahiratengay ato kimad. Oroma sato, kasapinangan a demak, o nirakatan no nikapolongan no Taywan, tangasa tonini 30 mihecaan, itiya to masapinang ko kacomahad no nikapolongan, o nian a nisidayan a tilidan, mapatapal kita, caay ko inacilaay ho a demak, nikapolongan, caay ko tangsol sanay ciheci, onini i o dadoedoen no ikoray a tamdaw, padoedo mipadama ato midoedo to nian.
S.PHON: == aniniaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ɾikisi - **** misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ == ika a paʦipatan "misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ" a ɾikisi. to~una mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~uja "to~uŋjin kanɾo~uan səʦi ɾinʦi təɾəkan" i, o~u nipatatəko~uan mato~u ʦaajħo~u ka taʡəŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u tajwan, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ, ʦħən *ħəŋran, waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui aʦi masao~u nikar sasəpat, pakajni pisaʡo~usi naŋra to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ni sħi miŋ to~u "*** miħəʦaan ɾikisi no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw", maɾa o~u miɾijaŋaj to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" marəpət no~u miħəɾamaj, saka o~u nian a ɬ~ɮəmak, saka tato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan miɾijaŋ to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan o~unto~u. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "to~uŋjin kanɾo~uan səʦi ɾinʦi təɾəkan", nika o~u tajwan o~u ʦaʦiso~uʡəɾinaj to~u o~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ato~u mapako~uniraaj ħaw? so~uʡəɾinaj ʦaajaj aʦa. itija, o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "to~uŋjin kanɾo~uan səʦi ɾinʦi təɾəkan" a saan, ira ħo~u ko~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək", rikəʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~usir o~u mamipataɾa to~u sapirawraw raraw, maŋo~uʦəɬ~ɮisaj a tawa, mipaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mikanto~uk to~u sapako~uniraaw no~u finaɾan no~u tajwan. nano~uja, to~una tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u kiŋkiwsi ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ (ɾi*o~u~u o~u~u*-tħ*ŋ), matajaɾaj to~u po~unka tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋran (t*n ts*ŋ-ji*n), sjakaj o~unto~u a fafaħijan ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~ui (*ŋ si*-ħo~u~u*) aʦi masao~u nikar sasəpat, o~u pisaʡo~usi naŋra to~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni sħi miŋ to~u "*** miħəʦaan ɾikisi no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw" i, mapamo~utək no~u fawo~upo~u miħəɾamaj. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħəɾamaj mao~uʦo~ur ko~u papinapina tamɬ~ɮaw misəto~uɾ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u, mirəpət ʦaŋraan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa o~u nano~u niɬ~ɮamaan ni sħi miŋ ʦaŋra, miʦo~uwat to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf i tajwan, o~u mamifəɾiħ to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" saan saka rəpətən ʦaŋra, nano~u nian a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paʦipat to~u sapisintiŋ a kapaħ no~u ɾo~u~ukai tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦə*ao~u~u ɬ~ɮro~u~uɾo~u~uɾan, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ rəpatan miro~ufo~u itija. nano~ujaan, o~u nano~u nisiməɬ~ɮan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "*** miħəʦaan ɾikisi no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw", aɾa ʦəʦaj to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~unini a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, aɾatək ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw pakanəŋnəŋ tajra i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi sħi miŋan, o~urasaka, ira ko~u saanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾəŋat ko~u miʦo~uwat to~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf i tajwan, so~uʡəɾin atəkak ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ko~u~uo~umintaŋ, saki maʦo~uwataj ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ o~unto~u no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a pataɾaw na saan i, o~u ħaɾaka to~u piəpəʦ to~u siʦian ko~u matiniaj. pakajni to~u nian pirəpat a ɬ~ɮəmak ranikaj sa masasiʦaɾaj ko~u kasaɬ~ɮajkako~u, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajra masafəɾəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i "ɬ~ɮa*ħo~uŋ*ħi*ħəŋ" po~utaɾ miɾijaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa kasafəɾəŋan to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u səmo~uʡo~utaj miɾijaŋaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj maɾapɾapaj no~u imiən ato~u ħitaj, paʦo~ufʦo~uf ħan paɬ~ɮakaw to~u to~usija mipaɾaɾiw, nika matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak maɾa sapifəɾiħaw no~u finawɾan, saka miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi, ato~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ o~unto~u to~u rikəʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ. **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nai po~uɾo~uŋ kasa nijaro~uʡ mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u sjakaj o~unto~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piɬ~ɮama miʦo~ukər to~u marəpətaj no~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~unini a piʦaɾap a ɬ~ɮəmakan paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, itini no~u finawɾan a sapənəʦ, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾipo~ujin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək". itija * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaŋaj finawɾan paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u mifəɾiħaj to~u siʦi a piəpəʦ ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw mirakat, miɾijas to~u sijataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi. taħamatini, "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u, nika o~u sasapinaŋən ħo~u ko~u "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ ʦaajħo~u kaɬ~ɮəmak, o~urasaka o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ o~u nian to~u "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~uɬ~ɮir ko~u sapipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u o~u mamipataɾa to~u sapirawraw ko~u sapararaw. nano~uja, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u rikəʦ *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħaʦa maʦo~uwat. taŋasa saka to~usa miħəʦa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾipo~ujin kana to~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ masaɾo~uf, pakajni to~u nian a anaɾaɾ mapasətək to~u o~u ʦaajaj ko~u tatəɾəkən sato~u, o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmakan katato~uŋo~uto~uŋo~uɬ~ɮan nano~ujaan sato~u paħərək. manəŋnəŋ to~u, o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a anaɾaɾ mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦənʦi (pitəfo~uʦ) to~u mirawrawaj təɾək" ato~u "rikəʦ" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ pisaɾo~ufaw a taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɬ~ɮəmak, saki nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan ira aʦa ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a mafijo~uɾ, o~u misatataɬ~ɮaj to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a mitəka paħərəkan o~uja miɬ~ɮiwaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi ɾiao~u *ianħo~u~ua ko~u misjasiŋaj ɾikisi paɾa fiɾo~umo~u "saiko~uraj mifəɾiħaj ʦirarawaj a anaɾaɾ", o~u piɾiʦɾiʦan ato~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a saɾiʦaj, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u to~uja nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piħaratŋan minəŋnəŋ to~uja to~uʡək miħəʦaan maħiratəŋaj ato~u kimaɬ~ɮ. o~uro~uma sato~u, kasapinaŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u nirakatan no~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan, taŋasa to~unini ** miħəʦaan, itija to~u masapinaŋ ko~u kaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, o~u nian a nisiɬ~ɮajan a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, mapatapaɾ kita, ʦaaj ko~u inaʦiɾaaj ħo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, nikapo~uɾo~uŋan, ʦaaj ko~u taŋso~uɾ sanaj ʦiħəʦi, o~unini i o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uən no~u iko~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mipaɬ~ɮama ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u nian.
